description: As a software developer joining a new team, configure the browser according to the team's development workflow standard. Separate development bookmarks from personal ones, set up project-specific search engine shortcuts, and configure cookie and privacy policies for development environments to organize the browser for professional use.
instruction: Your new team's browser configuration standard is at ~/Desktop/dev_team_browser_standard.txt. Read it and implement all requirements. Your current bookmarks are a mix of development and personal content that needs to be reorganized. The standard specifies folder structures, search engine shortcuts for internal tools, cookie policies, homepage configuration, and download directory setup.
